(Intom in-nisa) ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Allal TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla huwa Xhud ta' kollox

57.translation: Dawk li joffendu lil Alla u lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, Alla jisĂ„Â§ethom f'(din) id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra, u Ă„Â§ejjielhom kastig ta' gĂ„Â§ajb

58.translation: U dawk li joffendu lill-irgiel u lin-nisa li jemmnu, gĂ„Â§alxejn b'xejn, jitgĂ„Â§abbew (b toqol) ta' gideb u ta' Ă„Â§tija mill-aktar cara

59.translation: Ja Profeta, gĂ„Â§id lin-nisa u lill-bniet tiegĂ„Â§ek, u lin-nisa ta' dawk li jemmnu biex jilbsu l-gi/hab tagĂ„Â§hom (gĂ„Â§aliex dan. l-ilbies. jgĂ„Â§atti. gisimhom. kollu). B'dan. jingĂ„Â§arfu aĂ„Â§jar (bis-safa tagĂ„Â§hom), u ma jitkasbrux (gĂ„Â§aliex ma jkunux ittantati). Alla huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

60.translation: Jekk dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or u dawk li gĂ„Â§andhom marda fi qlubhom, kif ukoll ix-xewwiexa (kontra l-Islam) f'Medina ma humiex se jieqfu, tassew. li. nqangluk kontrihom. ImbagĂ„Â§ad ma jdumux girien tiegĂ„Â§ek fiha (dik il-belt) Ă„Â§lief gĂ„Â§al ftit (zmien)

61.translation: MisĂ„Â§utin (dawk in-nies), u kull fejn jinsabu, jinqabdu u jinqatlu (bla Ă„Â§niena)

62.translation: (Din hija) id-drawwa ta' Alla ma' dawk (il-gnus) li gĂ„Â§exu qabel, u m'intix se ssib tibdil fil-ligi ta' Alla

63.translation: In-nies jistaqsuk (MuĂ„Â§ammad) dwar is-SiegĂ„Â§a (tal- qawmien mill-imwiet). GĂ„Â§idilhom: 'L-gĂ„Â§arfien dwarha jinsab biss gĂ„Â§and Allaf' U xi jgiegĂ„Â§lek tkun taf (meta se. tasal is-SiegĂ„Â§a)' Jista' jkun li s-SiegĂ„Â§a tinsab qrib

64.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla seĂ„Â§et lil dawk li jicĂ„Â§du t-twemmin u Ă„Â§ejja gĂ„Â§alihom Nar iĂ„Â§eggeg

65.translation: Fih jibqgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§al dejjem, bla ma jsibu min iĂ„Â§arishom u min jgĂ„Â§inhom

66.translation: Fil-Jum meta l-ucuĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom jitqallbu ( 1 jiddawru) fin- Nar, huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Mhux li obdejna lil Alla, u obdejna lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut (tiegĂ„Â§u ukollji)

67.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Ja Sidna, aĂ„Â§na obdejna lis-sidien u lill- kbarat tagĂ„Â§na u (dawn) tellfuna t-triq (it-tajba)

68.translation: Sidna (il-Mulej), agĂ„Â§tihom kastig doppju, isĂ„Â§ethom saĂ„Â§ta kbiral

69.translation: Intom li temmnu, la tkunux bĂ„Â§al dawk li wegggĂ„Â§u lil Mosc (u gidbu fuqu). Alla Ă„Â§elsu minn dak li qalu (kontrih). Huwa kien bniedem ta' gieĂ„Â§ quddiem Alla

70.translation: Intom li temmnu, ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla (u obduh f'kollox), u gĂ„Â§idu kliem sewwal

71.translation: Huwa jsewwi l-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§kom u jaĂ„Â§frilkom dnubietkom. Min joqgĂ„Â§od gĂ„Â§al Alla u gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, ikun rebaĂ„Â§ rebĂ„Â§a mill-kbarl

72.translation: AĂ„Â§na offrejna r-responsabbilta (gĂ„Â§all-obbligazzjonijiet tagĂ„Â§na) lis-smewwiet, lill-art u lill-igbla, u. dawn ma ridux (jilqgĂ„Â§uha u) igorruha; u bezgĂ„Â§u minnha. Izda l- bniedem tgĂ„Â§abba biha. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq wisq ingust u ma jafx bil-bosta

73.translation: (Dak seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§) biex Alla jikkastiga lill-irgiel u lin-nisa ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, u lill-irgiel u lin-nisa li jxierku (a/lat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla), filwaqt li Alla jdur bil-maĂ„Â§fra lejn l-irgiel u n- nisa li jemmnu, Alla huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra, Ă„Â¦anin

1.translation: TifĂ„Â§ir lil Alla li tiegĂ„Â§u hu kulma jinsab fis-smewwiet u fl-art, u tiegĂ„Â§u t-tifĂ„Â§ir fl-OĂ„Â§ra (fil-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra). Huwa l- GĂ„Â§aref, li jaf sew (dwar kollox u kulĂ„Â§add)

2.translation: Huwa jaf b'dak li jidĂ„Â§ol fl-art u b'dak li joĂ„Â§rog minnha, b'dak li jinzel mis-sema u b'dak li jitla' fiha. Huwa l- Ă„Â¦anin, Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra

3.translation: Dawk li jicĂ„Â§du t-twemmin qalu: ''Is-SiegĂ„Â§a qatt ma hija se tigi fuqnaf' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Iva, (naĂ„Â§lef) fuq Sidi (il- Mulej) li tassew tigi fuqkom, (u dan naĂ„Â§ilfu) fuq (dak Sidi) li jaf il-Ă„Â§wejjeg mistural Ma jaqbizlu (xejn, lanqas) it-toqol ta' atomu, la fis-smewwiet u lanqas fl-art, u ma hemmx izgĂ„Â§ar minn dak, u lanqas akbar, li ma jinsabx fi Ktieb mill-aktar carl

4.translation: Dan biex jagĂ„Â§ti l-Ă„Â§las (xieraq) lil dawk li jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu l-gid. Dawk ikollhom maĂ„Â§fra u gid tajjeb u kotran

5.translation: Izda dawk li jĂ„Â§abirku biex ifixklu (u jxejnu) is-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, ikollhom kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

6.translation: Dawk li ngĂ„Â§ataw l-gĂ„Â§arfien jaraw li dak (il-Ktieb) li tnizzillek. (MuĂ„Â§ammad) mingĂ„Â§and Sidek huwa s-sewwa, u jmexxi lejn it-triq tal-FelĂ„Â§an, li jistĂ„Â§oqq kull tifĂ„Â§ir

7.translation: Dawk li jicĂ„Â§du t-twemmin qalu (bi rkasbir): ''Tridux nurukom ragel li jĂ„Â§abbrilkom li, meta tkunu tfarraktu gĂ„Â§al kollox (fl-oqbra wara mewtkom), terggĂ„Â§u. tkunu f'Ă„Â§olqien gdid

8.translation: Jaqaw (dan) qala' xi gidba dwar Alla, jew inĂ„Â§akem mill-ispirti) Le (mhux hekk)l Dawk li ma jemmnux fil- (Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra jinsabu fil-kastig, u f'telfien kbir

9.translation: Mela ma jarawx x'hemm quddiemhom u warajhom fis- sema u fl-art 2 Jekk irridu, ingiegĂ„Â§lu l-art tiblagĂ„Â§hom, jew inwaqqgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§al fuqhom bcejjec mis-sema. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li f'dan hawn sinjal gĂ„Â§al kull qaddej niedem

10.translation: AĂ„Â§na tassew tajna lil David tjieba mingĂ„Â§andna (meta gĂ„Â§edna): 'la igbla u tjur. faĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ru (il A/la) flimkien miegĂ„Â§ut' (Mhux biss, izda) rattabnielu l-Ă„Â§adid

11.translation: (u gĂ„Â§ednielu): 'AgĂ„Â§mel (minnu) kurazzi, u kejjel sewwa l-Ă„Â§oloq (zagĂ„Â§hom)t U (intom ilkoll), agĂ„Â§mlu l-gidi Jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq nara kulma tagĂ„Â§mlul

12.translation: Lil Salamun (rajnieh is-setgĂ„Â§a) fuq ir-riĂ„Â§: filgĂ„Â§odu jonfoĂ„Â§ u jasal f'bogĂ„Â§od milĂ„Â§uq f'xahar (safar), u filgĂ„Â§axija jonfoĂ„Â§ u jasal f'bogĂ„Â§od milĂ„Â§uq f'xahar (safar). AĂ„Â§na gegĂ„Â§elna gĂ„Â§ajn ta' ram imdewweb igelgel gĂ„Â§alih, u minn fost il-ginn hemm min jaĂ„Â§dem quddiemu, bir-rieda ta' Sidi, U min minnhom iwarrab l-amar tagĂ„Â§na, indewquh mill-kastig tan-Nar iĂ„Â§eggeg

13.translation: Huma gĂ„Â§amlulu kulma kien jixtieq: arkati, statwi, skutelli kbar bĂ„Â§al gwiebi, u kaldaruni (ta' l-ikel) imqegĂ„Â§din sew (f'posthom). ''Ja nies David, aĂ„Â§dmu b'radd ta' Ă„Â§ajrl' Izda huma ftit il-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§i li jagĂ„Â§tu Ă„Â§ajr

14.translation: U meta qtajna li huwa (Salamun) gĂ„Â§andu jmut, Ă„Â§add Ă„Â§lief dudu ta' l-art, li nawwarlu l-Ă„Â§atar tiegĂ„Â§u, ma wriehom li kien miet. U meta (Sa/amn) waqa', il-ginn intebĂ„Â§u li, kieku kienu jafu l-Ă„Â§wejjeg mistura, ma kinux jibqgĂ„Â§u fil-kastig ta' tkasbir

15.translation: (In-nies ta') Saba tassew kellhom sinjal f'arthom: zewg gonna; (wieĂ„Â§ed): fuq il-lemin u (ieĂ„Â§or) fuq ix-xellug. 'Kulu mill-gid ta' Sidkom (il-Mulej) u roddulu Ă„Â§ajr. (GĂ„Â§andkom) belt tajba, u Sid Kollu MaĂ„Â§fral

16.translation: Izda huma ma tawx kas (u ma tawx Ă„Â§ajr), u gĂ„Â§alhekk bgĂ„Â§atna gĂ„Â§al fuqhom l-ilmijiet tad-diga (il-kbira) u biddilnielhom iz-zewg gonna tagĂ„Â§hom (li kellhom sigar ta' l-aqwa frott) bi tnejn oĂ„Â§ra (b'sigar). li jagĂ„Â§mlu frott morr, bruka u xi ftit sigar tax-xewk

17.translation: Dak (il-Ă„Â§las) Ă„Â§allasniehom talli m'emmnux. Jaqaw se nikkastigaw (/il xi Ă„Â§add) Ă„Â§lief lil-dak li jicĂ„Â§ad it- twemmin

18.translation: Bejnhom/u bejn il-bliet li berikna qegĂ„Â§edna bliet oĂ„Â§ra (qrib xulxin) li jidhru sew. u gĂ„Â§amilniehom imbegĂ„Â§din bil-qjies, gĂ„Â§al min isiefer (u gĂ„Â§edna): 'Terrqu fihom billejl u binhar, imĂ„Â§arsinf

19.translation: Qalu: ''Sidna (il-Mulej), agĂ„Â§mel li s-safriet tagĂ„Â§na jkunu aktar fit-tul'' Huma naqsu lejhom infushom u gĂ„Â§alhekk gĂ„Â§amilniehom stejjer (biex Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or jitkellem dwarhom u jieĂ„Â§u tagĂ„Â§lima minnhom) u xerridniehom gĂ„Â§al kollox. Tassew li f'dan hawn sinjali gĂ„Â§al kulmin jistabar, li jagĂ„Â§ti Ă„Â§ajr

20.translation: Sewwa Ă„Â§aseb ix-Xitan fuqhom, u huma mxew warajh, Ă„Â§lief gĂ„Â§al gemgĂ„Â§a ta' nies li jemmnu

21.translation: Ma kellux setgĂ„Â§a fuqhom Ă„Â§lief biex inkunu nafu lil dak (fosthom) li jemmen fl-OĂ„Â§ra (fil-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra) minn dak li jinsab fid-dubju dwarha, Sidek (il-Mulej) iĂ„Â§ares lil kollox (ar lil kulĂ„Â§add mill-Ă„Â§sara)

22.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad lill-pagani): 'SejĂ„Â§u lil dawk (l- allat) li tgĂ„Â§idu li huma minflok Alla. Huma ma gĂ„Â§andhomx. it-toqol ta' atomu (wieĂ„Â§ed biss, la) fis- smewwiet u lanqas fl-art, u ma gĂ„Â§andhom ebda sehem fihom it-tnejn, u ( 4/la) ma gĂ„Â§andu (bzonn) lil Ă„Â§add minnhom biex jgĂ„Â§imu

23.translation: Ma tiswa xejn l-intercessjoni miegĂ„Â§u, Ă„Â§lief lil-min (Alla). iĂ„Â§allih (li jagĂ„Â§mel dan). U meta l-biza' jĂ„Â§alli qlubhom (dawk (i jintercedu f'Jum: il-Gudizzju) jgĂ„Â§idu (lil xulxin): X'qal Sidkomi' Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Is-sewwal Huwa l-GĂ„Â§oli, il-Kbir

24.translation: (GĂ„Â§idcilhom ukoll. MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Min. jagĂ„Â§tikom. l- gĂ„Â§ajxien. mis-smewwiet u. l-artf' GĂ„Â§id: 'Allal U tabilĂ„Â§aqq li, jew aĂ„Â§na jew intom, ninsabu fit-triq it-tajba, jew f'telfien mill-aktar car

25.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Ma tkunux mistoqsijin dwar xi Ă„Â§azen li gĂ„Â§amilna, ti ma nkunux mistoqsijin dwar dak li tagĂ„Â§mlu

26.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom lill-pagani): 'Sidna (il-Mulej) jigmagĂ„Â§na (ilkoll flimkien). imbagĂ„Â§ad. jagĂ„Â§mel. Ă„Â§aqq. minna. fis- sewwa. Huwa l-ImĂ„Â§allef (gusi) li jaf kollox

27.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Uruni lil dawk (l-allat l- aĂ„Â§ra) li laqqajtu miegĂ„Â§u bĂ„Â§ala ixirka (tiegĂ„Â§u). Le (dan ma tistgĂ„Â§ux tagĂ„Â§mluh)i Huwa Alla l-FelĂ„Â§an, l-GĂ„Â§aref

28.translation: AĂ„Â§na ma bgĂ„Â§atniekx (MuĂ„Â§ammad) jekk mhux gĂ„Â§all- bnedmin kollha, bĂ„Â§ala xandar tal-bxara t-tajba u wieĂ„Â§ed li jwissi, izda Ă„Â§afna min-nies ma jafux (dwar dan)

29.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Meta (sseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§) din il-wegĂ„Â§da, jekk qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

30.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): ''GĂ„Â§andkom Jum imwiegĂ„Â§ed li la titfgĂ„Â§uh lura u lanqas igibuh 'il quddiem b'siegĂ„Â§a

31.translation: Dawk li jieĂ„Â§du t-twemmin jgĂ„Â§idu: 'M'aĂ„Â§niex se nemmnu f'dan il-Qoran, u lanqas f'dak (li nizel fiz- zminijiet) ta' qablut' Li kieku tara l-Ă„Â§ziena meta jkunu mgegĂ„Â§lin jieqfu quddiem Sidhom, kif iwaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lu f'xulxint Dawk (fosthom). li kienu maĂ„Â§qurin jgĂ„Â§idu lil-dawk li ikabbru: 'Li kieku mhux minĂ„Â§abba fikom, konna nkunu minn dawk li jemmnur

32.translation: Dawk li tkabbru jgĂ„Â§idu lil dawk li kienu maĂ„Â§qurin: ZJaqaw aĂ„Â§na zammejniekom mit-tmexxija t-tajba wara li gietkom/ 7 Le (twaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lux fina); kontu intom il-Ă„Â§atjinf

33.translation: Dawk li kienu maĂ„Â§qurin jgĂ„Â§idu lil dawk li tkabbru: Mhux hekk, izda kien it-tnassis (tagĂ„Â§kom), lejl u nhar, meta kontu tordnawlna nicĂ„Â§du lil Alla u nxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra) miegĂ„Â§u;' Huma zammu s-sogĂ„Â§ba (moĂ„Â§bija gewwa fihom) meta raw il-kastig, u AĂ„Â§na qegĂ„Â§edna l-ktajjen madwar gĂ„Â§enuq dawk li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin: Jaqaw se jitĂ„Â§allsu (ta' xi Ă„Â§aga oĂ„Â§ra) gĂ„Â§ajr ta' dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

34.translation: Ma'bgĂ„Â§atna (gatt) f'belt lil min iwissi li l-gĂ„Â§onja tagĂ„Â§ha ma qalux: 'AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq nicĂ„Â§du dak li kontu mibgĂ„Â§utin bihf

35.translation: Huma qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na gĂ„Â§andna aktar gid u wlied, u m'aĂ„Â§niex se nkunu kastigati

36.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ' TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidi jkattar il- gid lil min irid, u jnaqqsu (lif min jidhirlu), izda l-kotra tan-nies ma jafux

37.translation: Ma. humiex il-gid tagĂ„Â§kom u lanqas uliedkom li jqarrbukom lejna. (Ma jersqux lejna) Ă„Â§lief dawk li jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu l-gid. Dawk gĂ„Â§andhom Ă„Â§las doppju ta' dak li gĂ„Â§amlu, u jinsabu mĂ„Â§arsin (minn kull Ă„Â§sara) fl- gĂ„Â§amajjar (tal-Genna)

38.translation: Izda dawk li jĂ„Â§abirku kontra s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, biex ifixkluhom, dawk jingiebu fil-kastig

39.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Sidi tabilĂ„Â§aqq ikattar il-gid lil min irid mill-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u, u jnaqqsu (lil min jidhirlu): Izda kull Ă„Â§aga li tonfqu (gĂ„Â§all-kawza tiegĂ„Â§u), Huwa jroddha (/ura lilkom). Huwa l-AĂ„Â§jar li jagĂ„Â§ti l- gid

40.translation: Fil-Jum li (Alla) jigborhom ilkoll, Huwa jgĂ„Â§id lill- angli: 'Jaqaw dawn lilkom kienu jqimu

41.translation: JgĂ„Â§idu (l-angli): 'SebĂ„Â§ lilek Inti li tĂ„Â§arisna, mhux huma. Le (mhux lilna taw qima), izda kienu jqimu lill- ginn: Il-kotra tagĂ„Â§hom jemmnu fihom

42.translation: Illum ma tistgĂ„Â§u tkunu la ta' gid u lanqas ta' deni gĂ„Â§al xulxin, U ngĂ„Â§idu lil dawk li gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen: 'Duqu l- kastig tan-Nar li kontu tgiddbul

43.translation: Meta jingrawlhom il-versi cari tagĂ„Â§na jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Dan ma huwiex Ă„Â§lief ragel li jrid izommkom minn dak li kienu jqimu missirijietkom.' U jgĂ„Â§idu (ukoll): 'Dan ma huwiex Ă„Â§lief qerq maqlugĂ„Â§ minn znied (dan ir-ragelji' Dawk li jicĂ„Â§du s-sewwa meta jaslilhom, jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Dan ma huwiex Ă„Â§lief seĂ„Â§er bic-cart)

44.translation: Ma tajnihomx kotba biex jistudjawhom, u lanqas ma bgĂ„Â§atnielhom qablek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lil min iwissi/hom

45.translation: Dawk ta' qabilhom giddbu (is-sewwa) u (il-pagani) ma laĂ„Â§qux wieĂ„Â§ed minn gĂ„Â§axra minn dak li tajniehom ((i/ ta' qabilhom). Huma giddbu l-MibgĂ„Â§utin tiegĂ„Â§i. U kemm kienet kerha l-kundanna tiegĂ„Â§i (lilhom)i

46.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Inwissikom Ă„Â§aga waĂ„Â§da biss: li tqumu quddiem Alla, tnejn tnejn, kif ukoll waĂ„Â§idkom, imbagĂ„Â§ad aĂ„Â§sbu sewt F'seĂ„Â§ibkom (MuĂ„Â§ammad) ma hemmx il-ginn (u huwa f'sensih). Ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr bniedem li jwissikom, quddiem kastig qalil (li riesaq fuqkom)

47.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom ukoll): ''Dak il-Ă„Â§las li tlabtkom huwa gĂ„Â§alikoml Jiena Ă„Â§lasi minn Alla biss (u lilkom ma nitlobkom xejn), u Huwa Xhud ta' kollox

48.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidi (il-Mulej) jibgĂ„Â§at is-sewwa bil-qawwa. Huwa jaf il-Ă„Â§wejjeg mistura
